hooks.comment: Print git context and last test results at session open
hooks.command: echo '=== Session Start ===' && git status && git branch --show-current && echo '--- Last test results ---' && cat .last-test-results 2>/dev/null || echo 'No previous test results found'

hooks.comment: Fallback skill install (web only, effective next session) + Python 3.14 + backend venv + frontend node_modules (web only)

hooks.command: json=$(cat); file=$(echo "$json" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -q '\.env'; then echo 'ERROR: Direct edits to .env are not permitted. Update .env.example and apply manually.'; exit 2; fi

hooks.comment: Block writes directly on main branch
hooks.command: branch=$(git branch --show-current); if [ "$branch" = 'main' ]; then echo 'ERROR: Direct writes to main are not permitted. Create a feature branch first.'; exit 2; fi
json=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$json" | jq -r '.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'rm -rf|git push --force|git reset --hard'; then echo "ERROR: Destructive command blocked: $cmd"; exit 2; fi

json=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$json" | jq -r '.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push.*origin main|git push.*main'; then echo 'ERROR: Direct push to main blocked. Raise a PR instead.'; exit 2; fi
json=$(cat); file=$(echo "$json" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -q '\.py$'; then cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/backend && ruff check --fix "$file" && ruff format "$file"; fi

json=$(cat); file=$(echo "$json" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(jsx|js|ts|tsx)$'; then cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/frontend && npx eslint --fix "$file" && npx prettier --write "$file"; fi

hooks.comment: Run full test suite when Claude finishes a task
hooks.command: echo '--- Running full test suite ---' && cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/backend && python -m pytest --tb=short 2>&1 | tee $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.last-test-results && cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/frontend && npx vitest run 2>&1 | tee -a $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.last-test-results && echo '--- Test run complete ---'
